checks.describe: Ollama is running on the host and answers /api/version — the model server the whole lab depends on
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/version | jq -r 'if .version then "ollama-up" else "ollama-down" end'

checks.describe: the Q4 course model qwen3:0.6b is pulled and listed by Ollama (the M1 model, still present for M2)
checks.run: ollama list | grep -c 'qwen3:0.6b ' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo q4-present; else echo q4-missing; fi'

checks.describe: the second quant qwen3:0.6b-q8_0 is available: self-seeds by pulling it if absent, then confirms both quants list together (Step 2)
checks.run: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0' || ollama pull qwen3:0.6b-q8_0 >/dev/null 2>&1; ollama list | grep -c 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo q8-present; else echo q8-missing; fi'

checks.describe: on disk the Q8 quant is larger than the Q4 quant — the memory-math exhibit (Step 2). Self-seeds the Q8 quant if absent; asserts the shape 'Q8 bigger', never a fixed size
checks.run: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0' || ollama pull qwen3:0.6b-q8_0 >/dev/null 2>&1; Q4=$(ollama list | grep 'qwen3:0.6b ' | grep -oE '[0-9]+ MB' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); Q8=$(ollama list | grep 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0' | grep -oE '[0-9]+ MB' | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); if [ -n "$Q4" ] && [ -n "$Q8" ] && [ "$Q8" -gt "$Q4" ]; then echo q8-bigger; else echo q8-not-bigger; fi

checks.describe: the same prompt decodes faster on Q4 than on Q8 — the bandwidth-bound-decode exhibit (Step 3). Self-seeds Q8 if absent; compares eval_rate, asserts the shape 'Q4 faster', never a fixed tok/s
checks.run: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0' || ollama pull qwen3:0.6b-q8_0 >/dev/null 2>&1; R4=$(curl -s --max-time 90 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","prompt":"In about 100 words, explain why the sky is blue. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false}' | jq '.eval_count/(.eval_duration/1e9)'); R8=$(curl -s --max-time 90 http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b-q8_0","prompt":"In about 100 words, explain why the sky is blue. /no_think","stream":false,"think":false}' | jq '.eval_count/(.eval_duration/1e9)'); echo "$R4 $R8" | awk '{ if ($1 > $2) print "q4-faster"; else print "q4-not-faster" }'

checks.describe: ollama show reports the honest parameter count, the model-max context, and the quantization field — the terminal model card (Step 5). Asserts the three fields are present, not their exact values
checks.run: ollama show qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -Eic 'parameters|context length|quantization' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 3 ]; then echo card-complete; else echo card-incomplete; fi'

checks.describe: the course model's licence is Apache-2.0 — what permits fine-tune and redistribute later (Step 5, lesson licence beat)
checks.run: ollama show --license qwen3:0.6b 2>/dev/null | grep -ic 'Apache' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo license-apache; else echo license-other; fi'

checks.describe: a non-streaming /v1/chat/completions response carries the usage billing meter with prompt, completion and total token counts (Step 6a)
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","stream":false,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a concise assistant. /no_think"},{"role":"user","content":"Name the largest planet in our solar system."}]}' | jq -r 'if (.usage.prompt_tokens != null and .usage.completion_tokens != null and .usage.total_tokens != null) then "usage-present" else "usage-missing" end'

checks.describe: a multi-turn request that resends the assistant history gets a coherent follow-up answer — the stateless-resend contract works end to end (Step 6b). Asserts a non-empty answer, not specific wording
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","stream":false,"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a concise assistant. /no_think"},{"role":"user","content":"Name the largest planet in our solar system."},{"role":"assistant","content":"The largest planet in our solar system is Jupiter."},{"role":"user","content":"How many moons does it have, roughly?"}]}' | jq -r '.choices[0].message.content | if (. | length) > 0 then "multiturn-ok" else "multiturn-empty" end'

checks.describe: capping max_tokens low makes the response finish with reason 'length' not 'stop' — the truncation exhibit (Step 6d)
checks.run: curl -s --max-time 60 http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"qwen3:0.6b","stream":false,"max_tokens":10,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Explain how a rainbow forms, in detail. /no_think"}]}' | jq -r '.choices[0].finish_reason'

checks.describe: Teardown removes the Q8 quant and leaves the Q4 course model — the reclaim-disk end-state (Step 7). Runs the removal, then asserts Q8 gone and Q4 still present
checks.run: ollama rm qwen3:0.6b-q8_0 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; Q8=$(ollama list | grep -c 'qwen3:0.6b-q8_0'); Q4=$(ollama list | grep -c 'qwen3:0.6b '); if [ "$Q8" -eq 0 ] && [ "$Q4" -ge 1 ]; then echo teardown-clean; else echo teardown-dirty; fi
